C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT. TERMS REPORTED INTO THE COURT RECORD. SEE CLERK MINUTES. JUDGE GALEN HATHAWAY. MARILYN NORMAN, REPORTER. D. CARTER, CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAY, BETSY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3782 ARMY STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,500.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-24-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICT. THRU 6/24/97 5 P.M. PLTF. WILL NOT OPPOSE A ONE WEEK STAY PROVIDED DEFT. REQUEST SAME THROUGH THE COURT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTY. FEES AND COST. SEC. DEP. FORFEITED TO PLTF. GEN. RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. CIVIL CODE 1542 APPLICABLE.
